one_liner: LULU +1.94% in Accumulation Phase B with DCF showing 7.9% upside — modest setup but low volume (0.60x) suggests the move lacks institutional conviction.

price_action.intraday_story: Quiet +1.94% session on very low volume. LULU is consolidating but lacks the volume energy for a breakout.

news_catalyst.headline: No specific LULU news today — general consumer sector movement
news_catalyst.summary: No significant LULU-specific catalyst. The stock is in Phase B accumulation with modest positive price action. DCF base of $126.39 vs $116.40 shows only 7.9% margin of safety — not compelling enough to be aggressive.

technical.summary: Accumulation Phase B on very low volume. The 0.60x volume today is consistent with supply drying up, but no SOS event yet.

wyckoff_narrative: Accumulation Phase B, drying volume. Watch for SOS above $117 on volume 1.5x+.

valuation.summary: 7.9% DCF MoS is marginal. Bear case at $97.51 represents real downside risk if athletic wear demand slows.

key_concerns: Nike and Alo Yoga competition intensifying
Consumer spend on discretionary items under pressure
fundamentals.summary: Modest setup. Not compelling enough to be aggressive at current levels.

risks: 7.9% DCF MoS offers limited fundamental buffer
